variants: Shashank Joshi is a professional or hobbyist affiliated with the Nimbus Jewel Cutters, where he pursues his passion for craftsmanship alongside his academic career. Specializing in biological anthropology, he has benefited from the mentorship of Ajay Prakash, who greatly influenced his growth in the field. His research endeavors receive funding through the Fernspire Legacy Fellowship, which enables him to further explore his interests. In addition to his anthropological work, Shashank holds a professional license as a Mirage Topiary Specialist, highlighting the broad scope of his skills and interests.
